name: Google Pixel Buds Pro 2
description: Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation, Google Gemini integration, 20-hour battery with case, custom-fit ear tips.

name: Microsoft Surface Pro 10
description: 13-inch PixelSense touchscreen, Intel Core Ultra processor, detachable keyboard support, up to 19 hours battery life.

name: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9 Ultra
description: 14.6-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2, S Pen included, IP68 water and dust resistant.

name: Insta360 X4 360 Camera
description: 8K360 video capture, invisible selfie stick effect, AI editing, waterproof to 10m, active HDR stabilisation.

name: Corsair K70 Pro Mechanical Keyboard
description: Wired mechanical gaming keyboard, MLX switches, PBT double-shot keycaps, 8000Hz polling rate, per-key RGB.

name: Ecoflow River 3 Portable Power Station
description: 245Wh capacity, 300W output, fast 1-hour charge, LFP battery, app monitoring, ideal for camping and outages.

name: Steam Deck OLED (512GB)
description: 7.4-inch HDR OLED display, 90Hz refresh rate, improved battery life, access to full PC game library on the go.

name: Ring Video Doorbell Pro 2
description: 3D motion detection, 1536p HD video, head-to-toe view, built-in Wi-Fi 6 support, two-way talk with noise cancellation.

name: ASUS ROG Ally X Handheld
description: 7-inch 120Hz FHD display, AMD Ryzen Z1 Extreme, 24GB RAM, expanded 80Wh battery for extended handheld gaming.

name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds
description: Immersive Audio spatial sound, CustomTune calibration, up to 6 hours playback with ANC, IPX4 sweat resistance.

name: Western Digital My Passport 4TB SSD
description: Portable external SSD, USB-C 3.2 Gen 2 speeds up to 2000MB/s, password protection with hardware encryption.

name: Nanoleaf Shapes Hexagon Kit
description: Modular smart light panels, music sync, touch-reactive, 16M colours, works with Alexa, Google, and HomeKit.

name: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Mouse
description: Ultra-lightweight 60g wireless gaming mouse, HERO 2 32K sensor, 95-hour battery, esports-grade performance.

name: JBL Charge 5 Portable Speaker
description: Powerful bass, IP67 waterproof and dustproof, 20-hour playtime, built-in power bank for charging devices.

name: Wacom Intuos Pro Medium Tablet
description: Pressure-sensitive drawing tablet, 8192 levels, multi-touch gestures, wireless connectivity, Bluetooth ready.

name: Meta Quest 3S VR Headset (128GB)
description: Mixed reality passthrough, Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 chip, standalone gaming, no PC required, wide game library.

name: Dyson Airwrap Multi-Styler
description: Coanda airflow styling technology, no extreme heat damage, multiple attachments for curls, waves, and smoothing.

name: Netgear Nighthawk RS700 Wi-Fi 7 Router
description: Tri-band Wi-Fi 7, speeds up to 19Gbps, 10G Ethernet port, covers up to 3,500 sq ft, advanced parental controls.

name: Xbox Wireless Controller (Elite Series 2)
description: Adjustable-tension thumbsticks, wrap-around rubberised grip, 40-hour battery, customisable button mapping.

name: Withings Body Scan Smart Scale
description: Segmental body composition analysis, ECG, nerve activity screening, vascular age estimation, app sync.

name: Samsung T9 Portable SSD 2TB
description: USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 speeds up to 2000MB/s, shock-resistant up to 3m drop, compact metal casing, password protection.

name: Roborock S8 MaxV Ultra Robot Vacuum
description: Auto empty, wash, and dry mop, dual-camera obstacle avoidance, 10000Pa suction, self-refilling water tank.

name: Razer Kishi V2 Mobile Controller
description: Universal mobile gaming controller, clip-on USB-C design, console-quality buttons, near-zero latency.

name: Ember Temperature Control Smart Mug 2
description: Maintains precise drink temperature via app, 80-minute battery life, LED indicator, auto sleep/wake sensor.

name: Canon EOS R50 Mirrorless Camera
description: 24.2MP APS-C sensor, 4K UHD video, Dual Pixel CMOS AF II, vari-angle touchscreen, compact and lightweight body.

name: Ugreen Nexode 300W GaN Charger
description: 6-port fast charging station, GaN technology, charges laptops and multiple devices simultaneously, foldable plug.

name: PlayStation Portal Remote Player
description: 8-inch HD screen, streams PS5 games over Wi-Fi, DualSense haptics and adaptive triggers built in.

name: Belkin BoostCharge Pro 3-in-1 Wireless Pad
description: MagSafe compatible, charges phone, watch, and earbuds simultaneously, 15W fast wireless charging, foldable stand.

name: LG UltraGear 27-inch OLED Gaming Monitor
description: QHD OLED panel, 240Hz refresh rate, 0.03ms response time, NVIDIA G-Sync compatible, anti-glare coating.

name: Anker Soundcore Frames Smart Glasses
description: Open-ear audio built into stylish frames, UV400 lens protection, touch controls, IPX4 water resistance.

name: Turtle Beach Stealth 700 Gen 3 Headset
description: Wireless gaming headset, ANC, Bluetooth simultaneous connection, 40-hour battery, AI-enhanced mic clarity.

name: Aqara Smart Lock U100
description: Fingerprint, keypad, and app unlock, Apple Home Key support, auto-lock, tamper alarm, weatherproof design.

name: Epson EcoTank ET-2870 Printer
description: Cartridge-free printing, refillable ink tanks, wireless printing, low cost per page, compact all-in-one design.

name: 8BitDo Ultimate 2.4G Wireless Controller
description: Hall effect joysticks, programmable back buttons, charging dock included, compatible with PC, Switch, and Android.

name: Vifa Copenhagen Bluetooth Speaker
description: Scandinavian design, wool-blend cover, 360-degree sound, 12-hour battery, aptX HD wireless streaming.

name: Elgato Facecam MK.2 Webcam
description: 1080p60 full-frame Sony sensor, uncompressed USB video, manual focus ring, low-light performance, no auto-tracking issues.
